description: Create a new facility named 'AgriChem Distribution Center' in Tier2 Submit 2025. Add a hazardous chemical to this facility's inventory using the CAS number lookup for Anhydrous Ammonia (CAS 7664-41-7). Configure the chemical with Range Code quantity reporting (do not enter exact amounts): Maximum Daily Amount range code: 05, Average Daily Amount range code: 04, Days on Site: 365. Set the physical state to Gas and ensure the EHS (Extremely Hazardous Substance) flag is checked. Select appropriate health hazards (Acute toxicity, Specific Target Organ Toxicity) and physical hazards (Gas Under Pressure). Save and export the submission file to C:\Tier2Data\output\agrichem_ammonia.t2s.
